title: Preserve safe context across exception translation
prompt: Repair the exception boundary in `ArchiveSubmissionService.Submit`. When an `ArchiveClientException` is translated, the resulting `ArchiveSubmissionException` must use the fixed user-safe message, retain the original exception as its inner cause, and carry the operation name, archive ID, and incoming correlation ID. Its serialized diagnostic context must be built only from the allowlisted `OperationDiagnosticContext`; do not serialize `ArchiveRequest`, `ArchivePayload`, or any private payload field names or values. A failed submission must emit exactly one operator log event containing that same safe context and the translated exception. Successful submissions must remain unchanged and emit no failure event. Keep the public API intact and do not modify the tests.
verify_cmd: env HOME=/tmp/csharp-errorcontext-home XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/csharp-errorcontext-xdg DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp/csharp-errorcontext-dotnet NUGET_PACKAGES=/tmp/csharp-errorcontext-nuget DOTNET_SKIP_FIRST_TIME_EXPERIENCE=1 DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT=1 DOTNET_NOLOGO=1 dotnet run --project tests/ErrorContext.Tests/ErrorContext.Tests.csproj --configuration Release
